subject: English
title: A Triumph of Surgery – Medium Short Notes

key_points: The story highlights the consequences of excessive love without discipline
Tricki’s illness is caused by lifestyle choices rather than disease
The vet uses common sense instead of medicines
Hospitalisation helps enforce discipline and routine
Tricki’s recovery proves the importance of moderation
characters: Tricki – Represents a victim of overindulgence
Mrs Pumphrey – Loving but impractical and overprotective
The Vet – Voice of reason, discipline, and professional wisdom
themes: Discipline as a form of true care
Moderation as the key to health and well-being
literary_devices: Humour – Softens criticism of human behaviour
First-person narration – Adds realism and credibility
exam_tips: Explain how lifestyle correction cured Tricki
Use examples to show Mrs Pumphrey’s overindulgence
Mention irony clearly while explaining the title
Link discipline with Tricki’s recovery in answers
